name: codex-map
description: Visual dashboard for inspecting and mapping your Codex CLI setup.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Codex sessions, skills, MCP, and token burn.
interface.longDescription: Codex Map makes your Codex home and project overlays visible with dashboards for sessions, skills, MCP servers, plugins, raw files, and detailed token burn analytics.
defaultPrompt: Open the Codex usage dashboard for this machine.
Show which projects burn the most Codex tokens.
Inspect skills, MCP servers, and recent sessions.
